text: Here, I move from the anticipation of a nearly empty auditorium—where echoes of previous conversations and a faint hum of technology fill the air—to the colorful immersion of an exhibit space that celebrates research and development. The transition is almost metaphysical, as I shift from the quiet prelude of a gathering to a space already alive with ideas and text. I feel curious and reflective, keenly aware of how each environment shapes my thoughts about the passage of time, the pursuit of knowledge, and our collective striving for significance.
